title: MD
biography: Denis Mukwege is a Congolese gynecological surgeon who won the Nobel Peace Prize in 2018 for his efforts to end the use of sexual violence as a weapon of war. He founded the Panzi Hospital in Bukavu in 1999 and has treated over 50,000 survivors of sexual violence, becoming a global advocate for conflict-related sexual violence survivors.
aiSummary: Denis Mukwege is a gynecology specialist at Panzi Hospital in Bukavu. Nobel Peace Prize 2018 for efforts against sexual violence in conflict. Based in Bukavu, Democratic Republic of the Congo.
techniquesInvented: Specialized surgical protocols for sexual violence survivors

timeline.title: Graduated from University of Burundi
timeline.description: Earned medical degree and began practicing medicine in the DRC

timeline.title: Founded Panzi Hospital
timeline.description: Established the hospital in Bukavu to treat survivors of sexual violence

timeline.title: Survived assassination attempt
timeline.description: Was attacked at his home; his bodyguard was killed but Mukwege survived

timeline.title: Nobel Peace Prize
timeline.description: Awarded jointly with Nadia Murad for efforts to end sexual violence as a weapon of war
